purpose: Analyzes codebases to build queryable repository maps for AI agents to get focused context.

modules.description: CLI commands and terminal UI with progress display
Configuration loading from environment and defaults
Pipeline orchestration, checkpoints, and graph management
Shared utilities: LLM client, validation, metrics, rate limiting
Multi-level code analysis pipeline (harvest, detect, divide, annotate, validate)
Query engine for filtering, ranking, and formatting results

conventions: Use barrel exports (index.ts) for module public interfaces
Tests mirror src/ structure in tests/ directory with .test.ts suffix
Each processing level (0-4) in src/levels/ has isolated logic with validation
CLI commands in src/cli/commands/ export default command function
Core types defined in src/core/types.ts, level-specific types in respective index files
Error handling uses custom error classes from src/core/errors.ts
Metrics and logging use src/core/metrics-logger.ts and src/core/prompt-logger.ts
